banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock: 'Nordic Import AB', a Transportstyrelsen-approved registered importer, brings a brand-new Volvo XC60 into Sweden on behalf of a customer, Karin Andersson, who will be the vehicle's registered owner (not the importer itself). The vehicle's technical data is registered via eCoC (IVI), so no paper Certificate of Conformity is attached. Karin is buying the car on credit; the car is being put into service immediately with two ordinary number plates (front and back), as required for a personbil (car). Anders Johansson, Nordic Import AB's representative, signs the form. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information.

collectedValues.label: How was the vehicle brought into being as a Swedish-registrable new vehicle?
Importer's or manufacturer's email address, for contact if vehicle-technical details are unclear
Is the vehicle owner the same party as the registered importer?
Vehicle owner's surname and first name
Vehicle owner's personal identity number, or organisation number if the owner is a legal entity
Manufacturing year and month, or model year
Should the vehicle's technical data be registered via a single/individual approval (enskilt godkännande)?
Should the vehicle's technical data be registered using an electronic Certificate of Conformity (eCoC/IVI)?
Should a registration certificate be issued when this vehicle is registered?
Should the vehicle be put into service (påställd) upon registration?
Is the vehicle being registered under a leasing arrangement?
Is the vehicle being registered under a credit (hire) purchase arrangement?
Is the vehicle used as a traffic tractor (trafiktraktor)?
collectedValues.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Övriga upplysningar och uppgifter om användningssätt (4)'

collectedValues.label: Is the vehicle a class 1 motorised implement (e.g. mobile crane)?
collectedValues.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Övriga upplysningar och uppgifter om användningssätt (4)'

collectedValues.label: Is the vehicle a motorised implement or heavy all-terrain vehicle used as a traffic tractor?
collectedValues.sourceRef: TS8003, 'Övriga upplysningar och uppgifter om användningssätt (4)'

notApplicableFields.reason: single-stage type-approved vehicle, not a multi-stage-approved base vehicle — field not applicable
technicalDataViaIndividualApproval is false — requiredWhen condition false
vehicle has not been granted an end-of-series dispensation
vehicle is a car (PB), not a tractor/motorised implement/heavy all-terrain vehicle — free-text usage description not applicable

documents.note: Mock: import certificate from Nordic Import AB, since the owner (Karin Andersson) differs from the registered importer
Mock: signed by Anders Johansson on behalf of Nordic Import AB, dated 2026-07-15

documentsNotApplicable.reason: technicalDataViaEcoc is true — requiredWhen condition false; Transportstyrelsen retrieves the eCoC itself
endOfSeriesDispensationCaseNumber was not filled in — vehicle has no end-of-series dispensation

conformanceCheck.method: Programmatic re-derivation of every field's and document's effective visibility/requiredness from the schema's own required/requiredWhen conditions (a from-scratch GSP-0013 condition evaluator), cross-checked against collectedValues + notApplicableFields (fields) and documents + documentsNotApplicable (documents) for exact 1:1 coverage.

mutationTests.mutation: set isLeasing=true, isCreditPurchase=false, and remove financierOrgNumber
set ownerIsSameAsImporter=true (owner is the importer) with importOrManufacturerCertificate removed
mutationTests.expected: 0 errors — document requiredWhen condition now false since neither disjunct holds
mutationTests.result: confirmed 0 errors, document correctly no longer required
